Gourmet Donuts · All Day
Gourmet Donut — Double Chocolate
House-made fried donut dipped in chocolate ganache and topped with chocolate sprinkles
FJD$8
Price
1×
Portions
5 min
Prep
3 min
Cook
All Day
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Dough
Donut dough, proofed and portionedeach1
Glaze
Chocolate ganache, warmg40
Topping
Chocolate sprinklesg5.0
Method
1
Deep fry proofed donut at 175°C for 1.5 min each side until golden.
2
Drain on paper. Cool 2 min.
3
Dip top of donut into warm chocolate ganache.
4
Immediately top with chocolate sprinkles. Set 1 min before serving.
Plating Notes
Ganache visible on top. Sprinkles set. Serve on board or in paper bag.
Equipment
Deep fryer · Dipping bowl · Serving board
Allergens
GLUTEN DAIRY EGGS
TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH FISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
